THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENDES, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PR & COMPANY, LLC $1,395.00 PRINCIPAL, $143.70 INTEREST, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,663.70, IN SCA 28281 APPEAL FROM DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED. BY ACCEPTING WITHOUT RESERVATION A REDUCED PAYMENT ON HER HER INVOICE, PLAINTIFF COM- PROMISED OR WAIVED HER CLAIM FOR THE FULL PAYMENT.
